analysis.reasoning: Core message: China states it paid its 2020 UN assessed and peacekeeping contributions in full, framing this as concrete support for the UN and asserting that paying on time and in full is an obligation for all, especially major countries. Evaluation: CH1 (The West is immoral/hostile): Not promoted; there is no explicit or implicit attack on the West or the US. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): Yes; the tweet highlights China’s cooperative, responsible support for the UN through concrete action and implies commitment to multilateral obligations, fitting the benevolent/internationally responsible framing. CH3 (Epic history): Not referenced. CH4 (Appropriate political system/values domestically): Not addressed; this is about international conduct, not domestic system or values. CH5 (CCP government succeeds): Not directly; while it shows responsibility, it does not claim domestic developmental success or leadership under the CCP. CH6 (Culture/nature): Not applicable. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
